name: Ben Jaffe
abstract: Benjamin Jaffe (born January 26, 1971) is the creative director of Preservation Hall and plays tuba and double bass with the Preservation Hall Jazz Band.

concerts.label: Preservation Hall Jazz Band and Friends
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Charlie Gabriel
about_quotes.evidence: Ben and I have a beautiful connection... We recorded it. It’s on one of these albums.
about_quotes.doc_title: Charlie Gabriel interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Orleans, Louisiana, January 9, 2020
